code: import axios from"axios";const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:5000/api";const apiClient=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL});apiClient.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("kirana_token");if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}return config;});export const loginAdmin=payload=>apiClient.post("/auth/login",payload);export const registerAdmin=payload=>apiClient.post("/auth/register",payload);export const getProfile=()=>apiClient.get("/auth/me");export const getDashboardSummary=()=>apiClient.get("/dashboard/summary");export const getProducts=function(){let search=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:"";return apiClient.get("/products",{params:{search}});};export const addProduct=formData=>apiClient.post("/products",formData,{headers:{"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"}});export const updateProduct=(id,formData)=>apiClient.put(`/products/${id}`,formData,{headers:{"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"}});export const deleteProduct=id=>apiClient.delete(`/products/${id}`);export const getCustomers=function(){let phone=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:"";return apiClient.get("/customers",{params:{phone}});};export const addCustomer=payload=>apiClient.post("/customers",payload);export const updateCustomer=(id,payload)=>apiClient.put(`/customers/${id}`,payload);export const getCustomerHistory=id=>apiClient.get(`/customers/${id}/history`);export const createInvoice=payload=>apiClient.post("/invoices",payload);export const getInvoices=function(){let date=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:"";return apiClient.get("/invoices",{params:{date}});};export const downloadInvoicePdf=id=>apiClient.get(`/invoices/${id}/pdf`,{responseType:"blob"});export const getReceipts=()=>apiClient.get("/receipts");export const downloadReceiptPdf=id=>apiClient.get(`/receipts/${id}/pdf`,{responseType:"blob"});export const getDailySales=()=>apiClient.get("/reports/daily-sales");export const getMonthlySales=()=>apiClient.get("/reports/monthly-sales");export const getTopProducts=()=>apiClient.get("/reports/top-products");export default apiClient;
